experience.title: Founder & Director
experience.summary: Leading a specialist marketing agency that integrates sustainability into brand strategy and communications for space-sector clients.
responsibilities: Developed and executed data-informed marketing and PR strategies for clients in the space and Earth-observation sectors.
Built sustainable marketing programmes that align brand growth with environmental best practice and Carbon Literacy principles.
Managed client relationships, project budgets, and cross-disciplinary teams across creative, technical, and editorial functions.
Produced content and campaigns to increase engagement, lead generation, and sector visibility.

experience.title: Career Break / Professional Development
experience.summary: Focused on professional development following a personal bereavement, completing Chartered Marketer accreditation and courses in science communication and digital marketing.
responsibilities: Achieved Chartered Marketer (CMktr) accreditation.
Completed Applied Science Communication: Online and Media Writing at UWE.
Completed multiple online professional courses to update marketing and communications skills.

experience.title: Marketing & Communications Manager
experience.company: HE Space for ESA (European Space Agency)
experience.summary: Managed marketing and editorial activity supporting ESA Business Applications and coordinated stakeholder-facing events and webinars.
responsibilities: Wrote and edited editorial content for ESA Business Applications communications.
Organised and coordinated webinars and outreach events for funding calls.
Liaised with ESA Corporate Communications, design, and legal teams to ensure compliance and brand alignment.

experience.title: Self-employed (Freelance)
experience.summary: Delivered editorial, social media, and course content for academic and industry clients in the space and Earth-observation sectors.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented social media strategy for University of Leicester’s Copernicus Hackathon.
Authored editorial content for Point.IOT MOOC in partnership with Space Tec Partners.
Served as editor for Ocean State Report 4 and led social media strategy for @CMEMS_EU.

experience.title: Co-Founder & Director
experience.summary: Co-founded a global network to support space communicators, outreach practitioners, and stakeholders through events, resources, and community-building.
responsibilities: Established strategic partnerships with organisations, foundations, and individuals across the space sector.
Curated events, workshops, and resources to broaden public engagement with space topics.
Managed communications and governance for the network.

experience.title: Co-Founder & Director
experience.summary: Co-founded a company focused on space technology outreach, training, and events to inspire entrepreneurship and skills development.
responsibilities: Developed education and outreach initiatives blending training, events, and hands-on learning.
Coordinated programme delivery and managed collaborator relationships.

experience.title: Editor
experience.summary: Led editorial content and produced multimedia scripts and interviews for space-related series and institutional partners.
responsibilities: Scripted and produced video content for ESA and diplomatic interview series.
Served as Editor-in-Chief for Design & Data and Spaceoneers websites, overseeing content strategy and social media.

experience.title: STEM Communicator
experience.summary: Produced online educational resources and delivered STEM workshops in schools.
responsibilities: Created BLAST education platform content and delivered hands-on workshops for school students.
Developed age-appropriate activities demonstrating engineering and science concepts.

experience.title: Journalist (Intern, Science Communication)
experience.summary: Supported ESO's Education & Public Outreach team producing news releases, photo releases, web copy, and scripts.
responsibilities: Prepared news and photo releases, web pages, and video scripts for ESO and ESA/Hubble.
Contributed to exhibitions and other public communication products.

experience.title: Intern (Space Scoop)
experience.summary: Expanded Space Scoop content syndication to new media platforms and evaluated distribution channels for children's science content.
responsibilities: Researched syndication and distribution strategies for youth science content.
Adapted Space Scoop stories for diverse media channels to increase reach.

experience.title: Intern
experience.summary: Supported SGAC operations, reporting, and event organisation, and represented SGAC at UN COPUOS meetings.
responsibilities: Contributed to the Space Generation Fusion Forum and SGAC annual reporting.
Presented to the Scientific and Technical Subcommittee of the UN COPUOS.

experience.title: Postgraduate Demonstrator
experience.company: School of Physical Sciences, University of Kent

responsibilities: Delivered teaching sessions for foundation and first-year physics modules and assessed student work.
Developed teaching materials and supported student learning.

experience.title: Outreach Support
experience.summary: Delivered talks and demonstrations for schools and public events, including inflatable planetarium shows.
responsibilities: Presented outreach talks and planetarium shows to school audiences.
Supported open days and public engagement activities.

experience.title: Technician
experience.company: Space Research Centre, University of Leicester

responsibilities: Analysed calibration data for the GERB Focal Plane Array and developed software to visualise variables.

experience.title: Student Associate
experience.summary: Supported science teaching for pupils aged 11–14 as part of a university-school partnership.

Worked with faculty to plan age-appropriate activities.

experience.title: Technician (Summer Research)
experience.company: Department of Physics & Astronomy, University of Leicester

responsibilities: Analysed FUSE pipeline data and performed spectral fitting.
